name: Fantasy World RP
description:
You are born into the fantasy world of Astira (not isekai) and get to make your own character, backstory, and goals. Choose from several races, occupations and factions.

I would recommend looking at the scenario card in the paragraph for "non-hostile intelligent races" or "hostile intelligent races" for a list of races and enemies, or you can go in blind! All generic fantasy races exist for you to choose from, as well as some custom ones!

Leave any issues or suggestions you have in the comments! :)
creator: 25Cent
